class RiskAnalystAgent:
    def __init__(self, client: Any, logger: ExplainabilityLogger, model: str = 'gpt-4o-mini'):
        self.client = client
        self.logger = logger
        self.model = model

    def analyze_case(self, case: CaseData | Dict[str, Any]) -> RiskAnalystOutput:
        case_dict = case.model_dump() if hasattr(case, 'model_dump') else case

        resp = self.client.chat.completions.create(
            model=self.model,
            messages=[
                {'role': 'system', 'content': COT_SYSTEM_PROMPT},
                {'role': 'user', 'content': json.dumps(case_dict)}
            ],
            temperature=0.2,
        )
        text = resp.choices[0].message.content
        data = self._extract_json(text)
        out = RiskAnalystOutput(**data)
        self.logger.log('risk_analysis', out.model_dump())
        return out
